channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: USS Ford returns home after 334-day deployment
item.description: The USS Ford received a hero's welcome after nearly a year away, facing conflicts, a fire, and sewer issues.

item.title: Summer electricity bills rise as cooling costs increase
item.description: Rising electricity prices and hotter weather may make summer cooling more expensive for households.

item.title: Free fish fillets may help Maine's struggling fishing industry
item.description: Rising food and fuel costs hurt Maine's groundfishing industry, but a pandemic-era program offers support.

item.title: 15 years after deadly tornado, Joplin, Mo. remains united through kindness
item.description: Nearly 100,000 volunteers helped rebuild the town, and a spirit of community service endures. Researchers studying human behavior in disasters...
